item.title: Version 2.1.59
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.1.59

What's New

Version 2.1.58 — Knowledge Library Refinements

  • 🧠 Better Suggestion Parsing: AI-generated suggestions are now reliably parsed and identified in the Knowledge Library.
  • ☑️ Refined Accept Logic: The 'Accept All' merging functionality now correctly respects and preserves any manual rejections you've made in the diff view.
  • 🧹 Cleaner Content: AI suggestions now automatically strip away unnecessary markdown code blocks for a seamless merging experience.

item.title: Version 2.1.58
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.1.58

What's New

Version 2.1.24 — Seamless Cloud Synchronization

  • 🔄 Seamless Cloud Sync: Your chat list now stays perfectly in sync with your cloud account. Any changes you make are instantly reflected across your devices.
  • 📥 Automatic History Recovery: Chat messages are now intelligently restored from the cloud the moment you open a conversation, ensuring you never lose your conversation history.
  • 🔡 Improved Chat Reliability: Resolved several underlying issues to ensure that every chat session opens predictably and reliably every time.
  • ✨ Sidebar Enhancements: Added a live session counter and improved the sidebar visibility for better insight into your active conversations.
  • 🪟 Window Behavior Polish: Refined how the app transitions between full-screen and accessory modes to provide a smoother, more intuitive experience.
